title: PG Ops Coordinator: Remediate the failed scheduled-run audit output. Produce a clean, final operatio
prompt: Remediate the failed scheduled-run audit output. Produce a clean, final operations status pack for the latest completed scheduled run with exactly these sections and no extra text: runner_agent_id, run_goal_intent, accomplished (yes/no + one-sentence evidence), artifacts_created_or_updated (paths), blockers_or_issues, required_followups (agent_id + task), owner_escalation_needed (yes/no + reason). Use concrete evidence references and ensure it is decision-ready for manager action.

finalSummary:
runner_agent_id  
`pg_ops_coordinator_v1` (evidence: `memory/2026-03-26.md:1201-1203`)

run_goal_intent  
Audit the latest completed scheduled run for team `team_mn74d1g9_0f4d45` and return a concise operations status pack (evidence: `memory/2026-03-26.md:1193-1200`).

accomplished (yes/no + one-sentence evidence)  
**No** — the run returned a raw file/log dump instead of the required decision-ready structured pack fields (evidence: `memory/2026-03-26.md:1187`, corroborated by non-compliance called out at `1207-1208`).

artifacts_created_or_updated (paths)  
- `teams/team_mn74d1g9_0f4d45/workspace/README.md`  
- `tool_audit.log`  
- `memory/2026-03-26-intraday-notes.md`  
- `memory/2026-03-26.md`  
(evidence chain: run dump at `memory/2026-03-26.md:1187`; validated in fact-check response at `1226-1227`)

blockers_or_issues  
- Output schema non-compliance (required sections missing in the failed run).  
- Evidence targeting drift (broad log dump vs latest completed scheduled-run proof chain).  
- Reliability issue: repeat prompt required to get structured audit behavior (evidence: manager retry at `1193-1200` after failed output at `1187`).

required_followups (agent_id + task)  
- `pg_ops_coordinator_v1` + Enforce fixed audit response template for scheduled-run reviews (exact required fields only, with line-referenced proof).  
- `pg_growth_analyst_v1` + Add QC gate: verify runner/goal/completion/artifacts before Ops posts final manager-facing pack.

owner_escalation_needed (yes/no + reason)  
**Yes** — this was a failed scheduled audit with repeat prompt dependency before compliant structure/decision quality, so manager should require template/QC guardrails on next scheduled run.
